headline: General Dynamics Vs. Lockheed Martin: Buy General Dynamics for Deep Marine Backlogs
summary: General Dynamics (NYSE:GD) and Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) reported Q1 2026 results pulling the two defense giants in opposite directions. General Dynamics beat on submarines and Gulfstream jets. Lockheed leaned on a record backlog to explain a messy quarter marked by fresh program charges and a cash flow reversal. Submarines Carry GD. Program Charges Weigh On ... General Dynamics Vs. Lockheed Martin: Buy General Dynamics for Deep Marine Backlogs

headline: 1 Profitable Stock on Our Watchlist and 2 We Question
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies — as Jeff Bezos said, “Your margin is my opportunity”.

headline: Is General Dynamics Expanding Its Presence in the Submarine Market?
summary: GD is strengthening its submarine market presence as Electric Boat supports key U.S. Navy programs and rising undersea warfare demand.

headline: Lockheed Martin: A Great Entry Point In The Defence Industry (Rating Upgrade)
summary: Lockheed Martin upgraded to Buy after a 20% pullback: new $43B+ missile deals, compelling 16.9x P/E, and 5.7% FCF yield. Click here to read more about LMT

headline: General Dynamics: Great Business, But I Am Not Buying At This Price
summary: General Dynamics delivered 10.3% revenue growth in Q1 2026, with all four segments growing. Read why I rate GD stock a Hold right now.
